description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Storesprite 7 and earlier allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the next parameter to (1) addaddress.php, (2) editshipdetails.php, (3) register.php, or (4) login.php in secure/.
